nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, “Add your burnt offerings to your sacrifices and eat flesh.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: “Add your burnt offerings to your sacrifices, and eat the flesh.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：“你們儘管把燔祭加在平安祭上，自己吃祭肉吧！

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说：“你们把平安祭连同燔祭都拿去吃吧！
